compose.title: Send feedback
compose.description: Share suggestions or report issues. Your submitted feedback stays visible here for reference.

history.title: Your feedback
history.empty: You have not submitted any feedback yet.

errors.submitUnavailable: Unable to submit feedback right now.

header.title: Review student feedback
header.description: Work feedback as a queue with clear response status, searchable student context, and an in-place reply panel.

filters.search: Search by student, title, or feedback content

empty.title: No feedback in this queue view
empty.description: Adjust the filters or search terms to find the student feedback item you need.

detail.title: Feedback detail
detail.description: Respond in the same queue context without losing the list position.

responses.title: Responses
responses.description: Existing replies remain visible above the current draft.

empty.title: No responses yet
empty.description: This feedback item is still unresolved.

reply.title: Reply
reply.description: Responses are added to the shared reply stream for this feedback item.

errors.submitUnavailable: Unable to submit response right now.
